title: `Adullam #5725
definition:
Adullam = "justice of the people"

 1) a town of the Canaanites allotted to Judah and lying in the
    lowlands; site of the cave where David hid
nasbUsage:

 1) a town of the Canaanites allotted to Judah and lying in the
    lowlands; site of the cave where David hid

    NASB:  a Canaanite city
